strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backends
Founder of GISCollective demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative and long-term product ownership
Recent re:cinq role includes MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling, showing hands-on AI infrastructure exposure
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML product leadership, published research, or recognized AI expertise required for a Principal AI Strategy role
Career title tops out at Staff/Senior IC; lacks Director-level or Principal-scale influence advising strategic customers
No evidence of cloud-platform strategy work or shaping future-state cloud products at scale

key_factors.factor: Recognized AI expertise and AI-built products
Director-level IC influence and external thought leadership
Breadth of engineering experience across stacks and 15+ years tenure

response.justification: The role demands a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, cloud-platform strategy fluency, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers. The candidate meets the 15-year baseline and shows recent AI-adjacent work via MCP generators and agentic tooling at re:cinq, but there is no evidence of AI products at scale, AI research credentials, or cloud strategy leadership. Public footprint centers on D-language tooling and a niche GIS platform rather than AI thought leadership, and titles remain at Staff/Senior rather than Principal/Director. Strong craftsman, but a mismatch for a Principal AI Strategy mandate.
